getContext.name: getContext
getContext.description: Get the current application context including tenant, organization, and resource access info.

graphql.name: graphql
graphql.description: Execute a raw GraphQL query or mutation against the XM Cloud Authoring API.

listSites.name: listSites
listSites.signature: () => Promise<Array<{ name: string; hostName: string; language: string; rootPath: string }>>
listSites.description: List all sites configured in XM Cloud. Returns array of sites with name, hostName, language, rootPath.
listSites.returns: Promise<Array<{ name: string; hostName: string; language: string; rootPath: string }>>

retrievePage.name: retrievePage
retrievePage.signature: (pageId: string, site: string, language?: string) => Promise<any>
retrievePage.description: Retrieve a page by ID using the XM Cloud Pages API.

navigateTo.name: navigateTo
navigateTo.description: Navigate the Pages editor to a specific item.

params.name: itemId
params.description: The item ID to navigate to

getItem.name: getItem
getItem.description: Get a content item by ID or path. Automatically detects whether the argument is a GUID or path.
examples:
const item = await sc.getItem("/sitecore/content/Home");
const item = await sc.getItem("110D559F-DEA5-42EA-9C1C-8A5DF7E70EF9");

getItemChildren.name: getItemChildren
getItemChildren.description: Get child items of the item at the given path.
examples: const children = await sc.getItemChildren("/sitecore/content/Home");

getMediaItem.name: getMediaItem
getMediaItem.description: Get a media item by ID or path.

params.name: idOrPath
params.description: Media item ID or path (e.g. "/sitecore/media library/Images/photo")

search.name: search
search.description: Full-text and faceted search across the content tree.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query with criteria, filters, paging, sorting, and facets

createItem.name: createItem
createItem.signature: (parent: string, templateId: string, name: string, fields?: Record<string, string>, opts?: { language?: string; database?: string }) => Promise<SitecoreItem>

params.name: templateId
params.description: Template ID for the new item

examples: const item = await sc.createItem(parentId, templateId, "My Page", { Title: "Hello" });

createItemFromBranch.name: createItemFromBranch
createItemFromBranch.signature: (branchId: string, parent: string, name: string, fields?: Record<string, string>, opts?: { language?: string; database?: string }) => Promise<{ job: SitecoreJob }>
createItemFromBranch.description: Create an item from a branch template.

updateItem.name: updateItem
updateItem.signature: (idOrPath: string, fields: Record<string, string>, opts?: ItemQueryOptions) => Promise<SitecoreItem>
updateItem.description: Update fields on a content item.

params.name: fields
params.description: Field values to update as `{ FieldName: "value" }`

examples:
await sc.updateItem(itemId, { Title: "New Title", Body: "

Content

" });

deleteItem.name: deleteItem
deleteItem.signature: (idOrPath: string, permanently?: boolean) => Promise<{ successful: boolean }>

params.name: permanently
params.description: If true, permanently deletes (no recycle bin). Default: false

renameItem.name: renameItem
renameItem.signature: (idOrPath: string, newName: string, opts?: { database?: string }) => Promise<SitecoreItem>

moveItem.name: moveItem
moveItem.signature: (idOrPath: string, targetParent: string, opts?: { sortOrder?: number; database?: string }) => Promise<SitecoreItem>
moveItem.description: Move an item to a new parent.

params.name: idOrPath
params.description: Item ID or path to move

copyItem.name: copyItem
copyItem.signature: (idOrPath: string, targetParent: string, opts?: { copyItemName?: string; deepCopy?: boolean; database?: string }) => Promise<SitecoreItem>
copyItem.description: Copy an item to a new parent.

params.name: idOrPath
params.description: Item ID or path to copy

params.name: opts
params.type: { copyItemName?: string; deepCopy?: boolean; database?: string }

addItemVersion.name: addItemVersion
addItemVersion.signature: (idOrPath: string, opts?: { language?: string; version?: number; versionName?: string; database?: string }) => Promise<SitecoreItem>
addItemVersion.description: Add a new version to an item.

params.name: opts
params.type: { language?: string; version?: number; versionName?: string; database?: string }
params.description: Optional: language, version (base version), versionName, database

deleteItemVersion.name: deleteItemVersion
deleteItemVersion.signature: (idOrPath: string, opts?: { language?: string; version?: number; database?: string }) => Promise<SitecoreItem>
deleteItemVersion.description: Delete a version of an item.

params.name: opts
params.type: { language?: string; version?: number; database?: string }
params.description: Optional: language, version (if not specified, deletes latest), database

uploadMedia.name: uploadMedia
uploadMedia.signature: (itemPath: string, opts?: { alt?: string; database?: string; language?: string; overwriteExisting?: boolean; versioned?: boolean; includeExtensionInItemName?: boolean }) => Promise<{ presignedUploadUrl: string }>
uploadMedia.description: Get a pre-signed upload URL for media.

params.name: itemPath
params.description: Relative path under sitecore media library

params.name: opts
params.type: { alt?: string; database?: string; language?: string; overwriteExisting?: boolean; versioned?: boolean; includeExtensionInItemName?: boolean }
params.description: Optional: alt, database, language, overwriteExisting, versioned, includeExtensionInItemName

uploadMedia.returns: Object with `presignedUploadUrl` to PUT the file to

getPublishingStatus.name: getPublishingStatus
getPublishingStatus.description: Check the progress of a publishing operation.

params.name: operationId
params.description: The operation ID returned from a publish call

getPublishingQueue.name: getPublishingQueue
getPublishingQueue.signature: (query: { sort: { field: string; direction: "ASCENDING" | "DESCENDING" }; paging?: { pageIndex: number; pageSize: number }; dateFilter?: { dateFrom: string; dateTo: string }; itemsFilter?: any }) => Promise<{ totalCount: number; results: any[] }>

params.name: query
params.type: { sort: { field: string; direction: "ASCENDING" | "DESCENDING" }; paging?: { pageIndex: number; pageSize: number }; dateFilter?: { dateFrom: string; dateTo: string }; itemsFilter?: any }
params.description: Query with sort (required), paging, dateFilter, itemsFilter

publishItem.name: publishItem
publishItem.snippet:
Sitecore.publishItem({
  rootItemId: "${1:itemId}",
  languages: ["en"],
  targetDatabases: ["web"],
  publishItemMode: "SMART",
  publishSubItems: true
})

publishLanguageSpecificItems.name: publishLanguageSpecificItems
publishLanguageSpecificItems.signature: (input: { itemsToPublish?: Array<{ id?: string; languages: string[] }>; targetDatabases: string[]; publishItemMode: "FULL" | "SMART"; publishSubItems?: boolean; publishRelatedItems?: boolean; sourceDatabase?: string; displayName?: string }) => Promise<SitecorePublishResult>
publishLanguageSpecificItems.description: Publish items with per-item language specifications.

params.name: input
params.type: { itemsToPublish?: Array<{ id?: string; languages: string[] }>; targetDatabases: string[]; publishItemMode: "FULL" | "SMART"; publishSubItems?: boolean; publishRelatedItems?: boolean; sourceDatabase?: string; displayName?: string }

publishSite.name: publishSite

publishWithOptions.name: publishWithOptions
publishWithOptions.signature: (options: Array<{ language: string; targetDatabase: string; publishSiteMode?: "FULL" | "INCREMENTAL" | "SMART"; publishItemMode?: "FULL" | "SMART"; rootItemId?: string; rootItemPath?: string; publishSubItems?: boolean; publishRelatedItems?: boolean; sourceDatabase?: string; publishDate?: string }>) => Promise<SitecorePublishResult>
publishWithOptions.description: Advanced publish with detailed options per language/target.

params.name: options
params.type: Array<{ language: string; targetDatabase: string; publishSiteMode?: "FULL" | "INCREMENTAL" | "SMART"; publishItemMode?: "FULL" | "SMART"; rootItemId?: string; rootItemPath?: string; publishSubItems?: boolean; publishRelatedItems?: boolean; sourceDatabase?: string; publishDate?: string }>

cancelPublishing.name: cancelPublishing
cancelPublishing.signature: (operationId: string) => Promise<{ success: boolean; message: string; publishingOperationId: string }>
cancelPublishing.returns: Promise<{ success: boolean; message: string; publishingOperationId: string }>

getIndex.name: getIndex
getIndex.description: Get info about a single search index.

rebuildIndexes.name: rebuildIndexes
rebuildIndexes.description: Rebuild one or more search indexes.

params.name: names
params.description: Array of index names to rebuild

examples: await sc.rebuildIndexes(["sitecore_master_index"]);

populateManagedSchema.name: populateManagedSchema
populateManagedSchema.description: Populate managed schema for search indexes.

rebuildLinkDatabase.name: rebuildLinkDatabase
rebuildLinkDatabase.description: Rebuild the link database for specified databases.

getWorkflow.name: getWorkflow
getWorkflow.signature: (idOrItem: string | { itemId?: string; path?: string; database?: string }) => Promise<SitecoreWorkflow>
getWorkflow.description: Get a workflow by workflow ID, or by item reference.

params.name: idOrItem
params.type: string | { itemId?: string; path?: string; database?: string }
params.description: Workflow ID (GUID string) or item reference object

examples:
const wf = await sc.getWorkflow(workflowId);
const wf = await sc.getWorkflow({ itemId: myItemId });

getJob.name: getJob
getJob.description: Get a specific job by name or handle. Names use simple string, handles contain "|".

isJobQueued.name: isJobQueued
isJobQueued.description: Check if a job is queued.

isJobRunning.name: isJobRunning
isJobRunning.description: Check if a job is running.

startWorkflow.name: startWorkflow
startWorkflow.signature: (item: { itemId?: string; path?: string; database?: string; language?: string }) => Promise<{ successful: boolean }>
startWorkflow.description: Start a workflow for an item. Sets the state to initial and clears all workflow history.

params.name: item
params.type: { itemId?: string; path?: string; database?: string; language?: string }
params.description: Item reference with itemId or path

executeWorkflowCommand.name: executeWorkflowCommand
executeWorkflowCommand.signature: (commandId: string, item: { itemId?: string; path?: string; database?: string; language?: string }, comments?: string) => Promise<{ successful: boolean; completed: boolean; error: string; message: string; nextStateId: string }>
executeWorkflowCommand.description: Execute a workflow command on an item.

params.name: item
params.type: { itemId?: string; path?: string; database?: string; language?: string }

executeWorkflowCommand.returns: Promise<{ successful: boolean; completed: boolean; error: string; message: string; nextStateId: string }>

translatePage.description: Translate a page to a target language using AI translation.

params.name: opts
params.type: { sourceLanguage?: string; brandKitId?: string; translateIfTargetVersionExists?: boolean; database?: string }

params.name: opts
params.type: { sourceLanguage?: string; brandKitId?: string; translateIfTargetVersionExists?: boolean; database?: string }

createSite.name: createSite
createSite.signature: (input: { siteName: string; hostName: string; language: string; templateId: string; collectionId: string; languages?: string[]; description?: string; displayName?: string; posMappings?: any[]; database?: string }) => Promise<{ job: SitecoreJob }>

Sitecore.createSite({

print.name: print
print.description: The globally-unique identifier for the item
examples:
const item = await sc.getItem("/sitecore/content/Home");
const item = await sc.getItem("110D559F-DEA5-42EA-9C1C-8A5DF7E70EF9");
const children = await sc.getItemChildren("/sitecore/content/Home");
const item = await sc.createItem(parentId, templateId, "My Page", { Title: "Hello" });

await sc.updateItem(itemId, { Title: "New Title", Body: "

Content

" });
await sc.rebuildIndexes(["sitecore_master_index"]);

const wf = await sc.getWorkflow(workflowId);
const wf = await sc.getWorkflow({ itemId: myItemId });
await sc.createSiteCollection({ name: "MyCollection", displayName: "My Collection" });
await sc.addLanguage({ languageCode: "fr-FR" });
await sc.createUser({ userName: "sitecore\\editor1", password: "P@ss1", email: "ed@co.com" });
print("Hello", { key: "value" });

render.name: render
render.description: Render HTML content in the Results tab.
examples:
render(`

Hello World

This is rendered HTML.

`);

help.name: help
help.description: Display help for Sitecore SDK methods. - `help()` — overview of all categories - `help("getItem")` — full docs for a specific method - `help("content")` — all methods in a category - `help("search term")` — fuzzy search across method names and descriptions

params.name: query
params.description: Method name, category name, or search term

fields.name: itemId
fields.description: The globally-unique identifier for the item

fields.name: path
fields.description: The full item path from root

fields.name: state
fields.description: Current state: INITIALIZING, QUEUED, RUNNING, FINISHED, ABORTED, etc.

fields.name: operationId
fields.description: The operation ID for tracking progress via getPublishingStatus()

fields.name: hasDeletions
fields.description: Whether any documents have been deleted

fields.name: outOfDate
fields.description: Whether the index is out of date

fields.name: isAdministrator
fields.description: Whether the user is an administrator

fields.name: isEveryone
fields.description: Whether this is the everyone role

fields.name: isGlobal
fields.description: Whether this is a global role

fields.name: members?
fields.description: Accounts that are members of this role

fields.name: memberOf?
fields.description: Roles this role is a member of

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: Whether this is the default domain

fields.name: previewPublishingTarget
fields.description: Whether this is a preview publishing target

fields.name: latestVersionOnly?
fields.description: Whether to return only latest versions

fields.name: criteriaType?
fields.description: Criteria type: EXACT, STARTSWITH, CONTAINS, ENDSWITH, WILDCARD, SEARCH, RANGE, FUZZY, PROXIMITY, REGEXP

fields.name: operator?
fields.description: Boolean operator for combining criteria: SHOULD, MUST, NOT

fields.name: displayName?
